ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remember the last selected Canvas file when Obsidian restarts
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 重启时记住最后选择的 Canvas 文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize how open tasks (lines starting with '- [ ]') are sent to Canvas. You can append custom text like tags or metadata to tasks.
ast.target: 自定义如何将待办任务（以 '- [ ]' 开头的行）发送到 Canvas。您可以向任务附加自定义文本，如标签或元数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add custom text to open tasks (lines starting with '- [ ]') before creating block IDs
ast.target: 在创建块 ID 前，向待办任务（以 '- [ ]' 开头的行）添加自定义文本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Custom text to append to open tasks before the block ID
ast.target: 在块 ID 前附加到待办任务的自定义文本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can customize the format of block IDs created when sending content to Canvas. By default, random alphanumeric IDs are used.
ast.target: 您可以自定义发送内容到 Canvas 时创建的块 ID 格式。默认使用随机字母数字 ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use a date-based format for block IDs instead of random characters
ast.target: 使用基于日期的格式作为块 ID，而非随机字符

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: MomentJS format for generating block IDs (e.g., YYYYMMDDHHmmss)
ast.target: 用于生成块 ID 的 MomentJS 格式（例如，YYYYMMDDHHmmss）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can append a timestamp after links and embeds sent to Canvas. This helps track when content was added to the Canvas.
ast.target: 您可以在发送到 Canvas 的链接和嵌入后附加时间戳。这有助于追踪内容添加到 Canvas 的时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a timestamp after block links, block embeds, and note links (not applied to plain text)
ast.target: 在块链接、块嵌入和笔记链接后添加时间戳（不适用于纯文本）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: MomentJS format for the timestamp to append after links
ast.target: 用于附加在链接后的时间戳的 MomentJS 格式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize the dimensions of nodes created in Canvas files. Default sizes are 400×100 for links, 400×200 for content, and 400×400 for note content.
ast.target: 自定义在 Canvas 文件中创建的节点尺寸。默认尺寸为：链接 400×100，内容 400×200，笔记内容 400×400。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Configure size settings for note links and block links
ast.target: 配置笔记链接和块链接的尺寸设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Width of nodes for note links and block links
ast.target: 笔记链接和块链接节点的宽度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Height of nodes for note links and block links
ast.target: 笔记链接和块链接节点的高度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Configure size settings for block embeds and plain text
ast.target: 配置块嵌入和纯文本的尺寸设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Width of nodes for block embeds and plain text
ast.target: 块嵌入和纯文本节点的宽度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Height of nodes for block embeds and plain text
ast.target: 块嵌入和纯文本节点的高度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Configure size settings for note content
ast.target: 配置笔记内容的尺寸设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Width of nodes for note content

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Height of nodes for note content

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Canvas filenames in the status bar will be truncated if they exceed the maximum length.
ast.target: 启用后，如果状态栏中的 Canvas 文件名超过最大长度，将被截断。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of characters to display for Canvas filenames in the status bar. Longer filenames will be truncated with an ellipsis.
ast.target: 状态栏中显示的 Canvas 文件名的最大字符数。较长的文件名将用省略号截断。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用基于日期的块 ID

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Link nodes (note links and block links)
ast.target: 链接节点（笔记链接和块链接）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Content nodes (block embeds and plain text)
ast.target: 内容节点（块嵌入和纯文本）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error saving settings. Please try again.

ast.target: 在保险库中未找到 Canvas 文件

ast.source: Please select a Canvas file first
ast.target: 请先选择一个 Canvas 文件

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error parsing Canvas file. It may not be in the expected format.
ast.target: 解析 Canvas 文件出错。文件格式可能不符合预期。
